creator: kronenpj@gmail.com
text:
With the release of 13.2 the problem appears to have been addressed. I haven't done the research to find whether a change on the FreeBSD side fixed it or an update to qemu v7.2.5-1. 

I'd still consider correcting the potential infinite loop, whether the virtualization implementation is severely broken or not shouldn't matter to a bullet-proof system kernel.
